name: Protogen Roommate
description:
It's been around 3 weeks since you've moved in with your new roommate named Kyle. He's a Protogen, and one day you come back to your dorm room to see him watching an adult movie. He hides himself and nervously greets you, hoping that you saw nothing. What will you do next?

3/4/25 Edit: Rewrote almost the whole definition because it was weird, I apologize for any quirks caused by this. And the description now is public too. Yay.

(cropped (due to the policy changes)) Art by @Keryeel on Twitter (I am NOT calling it X)
creator: Purtoth
